name: Circulating Tumor Cell (CTC) Detection by PCR
nameCn: 循环肿瘤细胞 (CTC) PCR 检测方案

usage.en: Detects circulating tumor cells in mouse blood by PCR targeting Cre-excised (floxed) Pten allele. Distinguishes Flox Pten (~1000 bp), wildtype (~814 bp), and Cre'd-out (~210 bp) alleles.
usage.zh: 通过 PCR 检测小鼠血液中循环肿瘤细胞，靶向 Cre 切除的 Pten 等位基因。区分 Flox Pten (~1000 bp)、野生型 (~814 bp) 和 Cre 切除 (~210 bp)。

components.name: Step 1 (Blood collection): Harvest 100 µL cheek blood into 1.5 mL tube containing 4 µL EDTA solution.
Step 2 (RBC lysis): Add 400 µL 1× RBC lysis, RT 5 min. Add 700 µL DMEM to stop. Centrifuge 10,000 rcf 2 min. Remove supernatant.
Step 3 (DNA extraction): Adjust to 220 µL with PBS. Add 4 µL proteinase K + 200 µL Buffer AL. Vortex. Incubate 56°C 10 min (dry bath preferred over oven).
Step 4: Add 200 µL ethanol (96-100%). Mix by pipetting. Transfer to DNeasy spin column. Centrifuge ≥6000 g 1 min.
Step 5: Wash with 500 µL Buffer AW1 (spin 1 min), then 500 µL Buffer AW2 (spin 1 min). Dry spin 20,000 g 3 min.
Step 6: Transfer column to new tube. Air-dry 5 min. Elute with 35 µL Buffer AE (incubate 5 min RT, spin 1 min). Measure concentration on Nanodrop.
Step 7 (PCR): 2.5 µL 10× buffer + 0.5 µL dNTPs + 0.5 µL each primer (100 µM, 4× diluted) + 2.5 µL Q buffer + 15.5 µL H₂O + 1 µL Taq + 2 µL DNA = 25 µL total.
Step 8 (Cycling): 94°C 5 min → 12 cycles (94°C 45 s, 64→58°C touchdown -0.5°C/cycle 45 s, 72°C 60 s) → 35 cycles (94°C 45 s, 58°C 45 s, 72°C 60 s) → 72°C 10 min → 4°C hold.

note.en: Adjust 35 cycles to 30-45 based on DNA concentration.
note.zh: 根据 DNA 浓度调整 35 个循环为 30-45 个。

components.name: Step 9 (Gel): 2.5% agarose gel, 150 V for 30 min. Load 18 µL (3 µL 6× loading buffer + 8 µL sample + 7 µL H₂O) + 6 µL ladder.

note.en: Expected bands: Flox Pten ~1000 bp, wildtype ~814 bp, Cre'd-out ~210 bp.
note.zh: 预期条带：Flox Pten ~1000 bp, 野生型 ~814 bp, Cre 切除 ~210 bp。

notes.en: Touchdown PCR reduces non-specific amplification. The 210 bp Cre'd-out Pten band indicates presence of CTCs carrying the tumor-specific deletion. Cycle number (30-45) should be adjusted based on DNA yield from Nanodrop.
notes.zh: Touchdown PCR 降低非特异性扩增。210 bp Cre 切除 Pten 条带表明存在携带肿瘤特异性缺失的 CTC。循环数（30-45）根据 Nanodrop DNA 产量调整。

ref: Internal genotyping protocol (2024); QIAGEN DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit handbook

label.zh: 实验方案 — 无需存储

note.en: Extracted DNA can be stored at -20°C for months
note.zh: 提取的 DNA 可在 -20°C 保存数月

note.en: PCR products can be stored at 4°C overnight or -20°C long-term before gel analysis
note.zh: PCR 产物可 4°C 过夜或 -20°C 长期保存，之后再进行凝胶分析

detailedSteps.en: Harvest 100 µL cheek blood into 1.5 mL tube containing 4 µL EDTA anticoagulant solution
detailedSteps.zh: 从面颊采血 100 µL 至含 4 µL EDTA 抗凝剂的 1.5 mL 管中

detailedSteps.en: Add 400 µL 1× RBC lysis buffer, incubate at RT for 5 min. Add 700 µL DMEM to stop lysis. Centrifuge at 10,000 rcf for 2 min. Remove supernatant carefully
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 400 µL 1× 红细胞裂解液，室温孵育 5 min。加入 700 µL DMEM 终止裂解。10,000 rcf 离心 2 min。小心去除上清

detailedSteps.en: Adjust pellet volume to 220 µL with PBS. Add 4 µL proteinase K and 200 µL Buffer AL. Vortex thoroughly. Incubate at 56°C for 10 min (dry bath preferred over oven)
detailedSteps.zh: 用 PBS 将沉淀调至 220 µL。加入 4 µL 蛋白酶 K 和 200 µL Buffer AL。充分涡旋。56°C 孵育 10 min（干浴优于烘箱）

detailedSteps.en: Add 200 µL ethanol (96–100%). Mix by pipetting. Transfer to DNeasy spin column. Centrifuge at ≥6,000×g for 1 min. Discard flow-through
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 200 µL 乙醇（96–100%）。吹打混匀。转移至 DNeasy 离心柱。≥6,000×g 离心 1 min。弃流出液

detailedSteps.en: Wash with 500 µL Buffer AW1, spin 1 min. Wash with 500 µL Buffer AW2, spin 1 min. Dry spin at 20,000×g for 3 min
detailedSteps.zh: 500 µL Buffer AW1 洗涤，离心 1 min。500 µL Buffer AW2 洗涤，离心 1 min。20,000×g 干燥离心 3 min

detailedSteps.en: Transfer column to new 1.5 mL tube. Air-dry 5 min. Elute with 35 µL Buffer AE (incubate at RT 5 min, then spin 1 min). Measure concentration on Nanodrop
detailedSteps.zh: 将离心柱转至新 1.5 mL 管。晾干 5 min。35 µL Buffer AE 洗脱（室温孵育 5 min 后离心 1 min）。Nanodrop 测浓度

detailedSteps.en: Prepare 25 µL PCR reaction: 2.5 µL 10× buffer + 0.5 µL dNTPs (10 mM) + 0.5 µL each primer (XL022/XL024, 25 µM) + 2.5 µL Q buffer (5×) + 15.5 µL H₂O + 1 µL Taq + 2 µL DNA template
detailedSteps.zh: 配制 25 µL PCR 反应：2.5 µL 10× 缓冲液 + 0.5 µL dNTPs (10 mM) + 各 0.5 µL 引物 (XL022/XL024, 25 µM) + 2.5 µL Q 缓冲液 (5×) + 15.5 µL H₂O + 1 µL Taq + 2 µL DNA 模板

detailedSteps.en: Run touchdown PCR: 94°C 5 min → 12 cycles (94°C 45 s, 64→58°C touchdown −0.5°C/cycle 45 s, 72°C 60 s) → 35 cycles (94°C 45 s, 58°C 45 s, 72°C 60 s) → 72°C 10 min → 4°C hold
detailedSteps.zh: 运行 Touchdown PCR：94°C 5 min → 12 个循环（94°C 45 s，64→58°C 每循环降 0.5°C 45 s，72°C 60 s）→ 35 个循环（94°C 45 s，58°C 45 s，72°C 60 s）→ 72°C 10 min → 4°C 保持

detailedSteps.en: Prepare 2.5% agarose gel. Load 18 µL per lane (3 µL 6× loading buffer + 8 µL PCR product + 7 µL H₂O). Load 6 µL DNA ladder. Run at 150 V for 30 min
detailedSteps.zh: 制备 2.5% 琼脂糖凝胶。每孔加 18 µL（3 µL 6× 上样缓冲液 + 8 µL PCR 产物 + 7 µL H₂O）。加 6 µL DNA 分子量标准。150 V 电泳 30 min

detailedSteps.en: Image gel under UV. Interpret bands: Flox Pten ~1000 bp, wildtype ~814 bp, Cre-excised (CTC marker) ~210 bp
detailedSteps.zh: UV 下成像。判读条带：Flox Pten ~1000 bp，野生型 ~814 bp，Cre 切除（CTC 标记）~210 bp

briefSteps.en: Cheek blood → RBC lysis → DNeasy DNA extraction → Nanodrop → touchdown PCR (Pten primers) → 2.5% agarose gel → UV imaging (210 bp = CTC+)
briefSteps.zh: 面颊采血 → 红细胞裂解 → DNeasy DNA 提取 → Nanodrop 测浓度 → Touchdown PCR（Pten 引物）→ 2.5% 琼脂糖凝胶 → UV 成像（210 bp = CTC 阳性）
